company_name: Safe At Home Pet Sitting And Home Care LLC
tagline: Keeping pets and homes safe. Giving you Peace of Mind.

hero.headline: Veteran-Owned Care Your Pets Deserve
hero.subheadline: Certified professional pet sitters trusted by families across Desoto County. We treat your pets like our own while keeping your home safe and secure.
checkmarks: Fully insured for pets and property

services.headline: Everything Your Pets & Home Need
services.subtitle: From daily dog walks to farm animal care, we handle it all so you can travel worry-free.

cards.title: Dog Walking
cards.description: Professional 30 or 60-minute walks tailored to your dog's energy level, providing exercise and mental stimulation while you are away.

cards.title: Drop-In Visits
cards.description: Scheduled visits for feeding, potty breaks, medication, litter box cleaning, and quality one-on-one time with your pets.

cards.title: House Sitting
cards.description: Complete home security including package pickup, plant watering, light cleaning, and lawn care coordination while you travel.

cards.title: Pet Taxi
cards.description: Safe, reliable transportation for your pets to grooming appointments, vet visits, and other destinations across Desoto County.

cards.title: Farm & Exotic Animal Care
cards.description: Experienced hands-on care for horses, pigs, chickens, and other farm or exotic animals right on your property.

cards.title: Package Pick-Up & Home Checks
cards.description: Regular home monitoring with mail and package retrieval, ensuring your home looks lived-in and secure while you are away.

steps.title: Schedule a Meet & Greet
steps.description: We visit your home to meet your pets, learn their routines, and discuss your specific needs at no charge.

steps.title: We Create Your Care Plan
steps.description: Based on your pets' personalities and your schedule, we build a customized care plan with clear pricing.

steps.title: Relax While We Handle Everything
steps.description: Receive real-time photo and video updates while your pets enjoy professional, loving care in their own home.

about.label: About Us
about.headline: Law Enforcement Veterans Dedicated to Your Peace of Mind
about.description: Safe At Home is operated by Mike and Stephanie Pate, law enforcement veterans who bring the same dedication and trustworthiness to pet care that they brought to protecting their community. Certified Professional Pet Sitters through Pet Sitters International, they handle everything from dogs and cats to horses, pigs, and chickens across Desoto County.

features.title: Law Enforcement Veterans
features.description: Security-minded professionals who bring the same dedication to your pets and home that they brought to protecting communities.

features.title: PSI Certified & Fully Insured
features.description: Certified Professional Pet Sitters through Pet Sitters International with full business insurance covering pets and property.

features.title: All Animals Welcome
features.description: From dogs and cats to horses, pigs, and chickens — we have hands-on experience caring for every type of animal.

pricing.headline: Transparent, Honest Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No surprise charges. Just straightforward rates for professional pet and home care services.

guarantee.headline: Our Peace of Mind Promise
guarantee.description: We are fully insured, PSI certified, and backed by years of law enforcement service. If you are ever unsatisfied with our care, we will make it right immediately. Your pets' safety and your home's security are our top priorities — guaranteed.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Mississippi?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Desoto County including Southaven, Hernando, Olive Branch, and surrounding communities. Contact us to confirm service availability in your area.

faqs.question: Are you insured and certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We are Certified Professional Pet Sitters through Pet Sitters International and carry full business insurance covering both your pets and your property.

faqs.question: What types of animals do you care for?
faqs.answer: We care for dogs, cats, horses, pigs, chickens, and most other domestic and farm animals. During our meet and greet, we discuss your specific animals and their needs.

faqs.question: Will I receive updates while I am away?
faqs.answer: Yes! We send real-time photos and videos throughout each visit so you always know your pets are happy and safe.

faqs.question: What if I need last-minute pet sitting?
faqs.answer: We understand emergencies happen. Contact us as soon as possible and we will do our best to accommodate your schedule, even on short notice.

testimonials.name: Heather S.W.
testimonials.text: They saved me at the last minute, the day before my daughter's wedding. My pet sitter cancelled on me and she swooped in to save the day. She sent me pictures and it made me and my daughter cry because we were so relieved.

testimonials.name: Angeleah O.
testimonials.text: Stephanie does such a great job with my Minnie! I love that she checks in with me, sends me updates, pictures/videos, and tells me all that she's done with Minnie for the day. Makes me feel comfortable leaving my fur baby with her.

testimonials.name: Sandra M.
testimonials.text: Stephanie is not only professional but also prompt, ethical, and incredibly loving and caring. I trust her completely with my pets and my home.

contact.headline: Ready for Worry-Free Pet Care?
contact.subtitle: Schedule your free meet and greet today. We will come to your home, meet your pets, and create a personalized care plan.
benefits: Customized care plan for your pets
No obligation — just peace of mind

footer.description: Safe At Home Pet Sitting And Home Care LLC is a law enforcement veteran-owned, fully insured, and PSI-certified pet care company serving Desoto County, Mississippi.
footer.service_area: Serving Southaven, Hernando, Olive Branch, and all of Desoto County, Mississippi
footer.copyright: Safe At Home Pet Sitting And Home Care LLC
